overview.description: AI brand visibility tracking platform for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and other GenAI tools
overview.description_long: Seonali is an AI search visibility platform that helps brands understand how they appear in ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Gemini, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot, and other GenAI tools. The platform identifies brand mentions, share of voice, sentiment, and content gaps in AI-generated responses, then provides actionable recommendations to improve discoverability and recommendation share across major LLMs. Primarily serves enterprise brands, marketing teams, SEO leaders, and e-commerce managers.
overview.tagline: Make your brand the one consumers see across ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, and more.

history.origin_story: Czech startup building an AI search visibility analytics platform, with earliest blog content appearing from July 2025. Won WPP Media Business Open and featured on Startup Kitchen (Prague).

key_milestones.event: Founded; earliest public blog content published July 2025
Won WPP Media Business Open competition
Serving European Fortune 500 companies including L'Oreal TSH Hub

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Seonali's core value proposition — monitoring how brands appear in AI-generated responses — could be replicated by the AI platforms themselves (ChatGPT, Gemini) offering native brand analytics, or by established SEO/analytics vendors adding LLM tracking. The product has no proprietary AI models or data moat beyond the aggregation of cross-platform monitoring.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI visibility tracking is a genuinely emerging pain point as brands lose Google traffic to AI overviews, and Seonali has real clients including L'Oreal. However the market is nascent and attracting many competing tools; long-term differentiation is unclear.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding, very early-stage startup (founded ~2025) with a small team. Lacks the runway signals needed for confidence in long-term sustainability.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combination of high AGI displacement risk (thin technical moat against platform-native analytics) and high funding risk (unfunded early startup) makes this a high-risk play, despite operating in a real and growing market.

metadata.notes: Very early-stage startup; contact email is eduard@seonali.com suggesting founder named Eduard but full name not publicly available. No careers page found. Company appears Czech/Prague-based based on CZ LinkedIn URL. Founded approximately 2025 based on earliest blog content (July 2025).
